title: Softly Grilled Mexican Tortilla Tacos
description: A light Mexican dish featuring strong white flour tortillas, dehydrated for a unique texture, and filled with flavorful ingredients, perfect for a nut-free friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, dehydrate the tortillas in a low-temperature oven or a food dehydrator for 30 minutes.
Once the tortillas are dehydrated, grill them for 30 seconds on each side, or until lightly charred.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a slice of red onion and a sprinkle of cilantro.
